response.justification: Exceptional technical fit with 18+ years of full-stack experience and exact primary stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React, testing). Notably brings rare AI agent development expertise with MCP infrastructure work. Primary concern is 7-month career gap (Oct 2025–May 2026) requiring explanation, but candidate demonstrates sustained senior/staff-level roles and strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD and mentoring.
strengths: Perfect stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, AWS, and strong TDD/testing culture across roles
Rare AI agent development experience with MCP (Model Context Protocol) infrastructure—directly addresses required expertise
18+ years of consistent full-stack experience at Senior/Staff levels with architectural decision-making and mentorship
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned; experience is primarily raw Node.js rather than opinionated frameworks
Recent tenure at re:cinq was only 6 months, following longer roles—pattern unclear
